The Solaris Gold Compendium, authored by Hakeem Bahir, has been influential in ethnomusicology. He is actively involved in the Celestial Crafters Consortium, collaborating with both hobbyists and professionals. Simone Guerin serves as his mentor, guiding him through his academic pursuits.
